title: Mission Trip to Hungary - Gyor - July 2023
summary: Several years ago, the JA church of Den Haag, together with the church of Norway, travelled to Budapest (Hungary) to bring the one God gospel of Jesus Christ to this beautiful country with such a rich European history. During that trip in 2017, several souls were baptized, and many heard the message about one God and baptism in Jesus Name. For the next couple of years, there were some challenges, and the work was on a lower level for a while. We did not think we would travel again to Hungary and see the church flourish. But then the Holland church started praying again for Hungary. At some point a young lady called Alexandra, whom we had met on an earlier mission trip, contacted me through email and started asking questions about baptism. It turned out she had been touched by the message of Bishop Paul Thomas and his personal testimony about meeting the Lord. All these years she had been holding on to the one God doctrine despite being alone. Her enduring faith unfortunately led to her and her family being isolated, and they suffered some level of persecution. However, through the years she held on to her belief in Jesus by the grace of God. “Then said Jesus unto the twelve, Will ye also go away? 68 Then Simon Peter answered him, Lord, to whom shall we go? Thou hast the words of eternal life. 69 And we believe and are sure that thou art that Christ, the Son of the living God”(John 6:67-69) After communicating per email for some months, it was clear to me that Alexandra was serious about baptism in Jesus Name. “But Christ as a son over his own house; whose house are we, if we hold fast the confidence and the rejoicing of the hope firm unto the end.”(Heb 3:6) We decided to organize a trip to Hungary in July 2023, with the intention of baptizing this one soul, and making room for the preaching of the gospel. The dates were set to July 17th to 22nd.
